category_sources: source_facts.description says wv2 provides programs for accessing Microsoft Word documents.

repo_sources: Official wvWare homepage states the project is hosted on SourceForge and references CVS development workflow.
wv2 source archives are distributed under the official wvWare SourceForge project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Microsoft Word document access.
